Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's right before exams, so there are no[n]club activities. The classroom is silent...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There may be dangerous chemicals inside.[n]I better not go in without permission...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This room is for the photography club.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the science room. It seems to be used[n]as the dark room for the photography club.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the science room. It seems to be used[n]as the dark room for the photography club.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a smell that tingles my nose...[n]Maybe it's because of the chemicals inside.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the science room. It seems to be used[n]as the dark room for the photography club.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It stores the tools for experiments, as well[n]as the chemicals used to develop photos.[n]{f 1 1}
